payload.text:
Usage: /split <amount> @user1 @user2 [@user3 ...]

Split an amount equally among mentioned users.

name: /split with valid amount and two users shows breakdown

payload.text: Invalid amount. Please provide a positive number, e.g. /split 100 @alice @bob

name: /split with fewer than two users shows error

payload.text: Please mention at least 2 users to split the amount among.

name: /split with zero or negative amount shows error

payload.text: Invalid amount. Please provide a positive number, e.g. /split 100 @alice @bob
